summary: Frontend regression + new print/export PDF feature tested on Expo web preview (mobile 390x844). Login (admin/admin123) → /home works. Reports screen loads with 4 tabs (weekly/monthly/by-dept/completion); print + export buttons visible and functional on every tab — clicking them successfully triggers window.open() to render the generated HTML (Arabic RTL). KPI screen accessible via home action card; both print-kpi-btn and export-kpi-btn work. Full regression passed: home dashboard renders KPIs, activities list navigable, profile screen shows admin, logout returns to /login. No red screen, no page errors. Minor: window.open was invoked slightly more than 1× per click (React-Native-Web TouchableOpacity double-fire on click+press), functionally OK. Deprecation warning noted: shadow* style props deprecated.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' emitted by react-native-web. Non-blocking but should be migrated to boxShadow for react-native-web 0.21+ compliance.

action_items: (Optional) Investigate TouchableOpacity double-fire on web: export/print handlers appear to run once per user click but window.open counter incremented ~1 extra across 8 clicks (9 opens). Not user-visible on native. Consider debouncing onPress in reportExport call sites if noticed on web deployment.
(Optional) Migrate deprecated shadow* style props to boxShadow to silence react-native-web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: reportExport.ts printHtml/exportPdf web branch does not guard against popup blockers (w may be null) — silently returns. Consider surfacing a fallback (write to hidden iframe) or Alert if window.open returns null.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded admin data (3 activities, 2 employees) from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App uses testIDs: login-username-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, home-screen, action-kpi, kpi-screen, print-kpi-btn, export-kpi-btn, back-btn, reports-screen, tab-weekly|monthly|by-dept|completion, print-btn, export-btn, activities-screen, profile-screen, logout-button. Bottom tab navigation uses <a href> anchors ('/activities','/profile','/reports','/home') — click via page.locator('a[href*="/activities"]'). To capture print/export triggers on web, override window.open before clicking (see script). Login flow: fill username+password → click login-submit-button → redirects to /home.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Print/export feature works: printHtml() opens a new window and calls w.print(); exportPdf() on web reuses the same print-dialog fallback (letting user Save-as-PDF). All 4 report tabs + KPI screen tested successfully.
